get.description: Get discovery job progress from file written by subprocess.

schema.title: Response Get Discovery Progress Api Discovery Jobs  Run Id  Progress Get

post.description: Export a discovered strategy to the strategies table.

schema.title: Response Export Discovered Strategy Api Discovery Results  Run Id  Export  Strategy Index  Post

post.description: Export genome as strategy and launch screening/validation backtest.
Re-run genome through screening to verify discovery metrics match.

schema.title: Response Get Indicator Pool Api Discovery Indicator Pool Get

get.description:
Return every registered indicator spec as a catalog entry.

Ordered alphabetically by ``type_name`` via
``indicator_registry.all_specs()``. The UI is expected to re-group
by ``category`` using the ``categories`` field on the response.

schema.title: Response Heartbeat Api Backtest Jobs  Run Id  Heartbeat Post
Response Save Trades Api Backtest Jobs  Run Id  Trades Post
Response Save Sweep Results Api Backtest Jobs  Run Id  Sweep Results Post
Response Mark Pareto Api Backtest Jobs  Run Id  Mark Pareto Post
Response Halt Paper Api Paper Halt Post
Response Resume Paper Api Paper Resume Post
Response Stop Paper Api Paper Stop Post

post.description: Signal the paper trading process to close all open positions.

schema.title: Response Close All Positions Api Paper Close All Positions Post

get.description:
Return open positions from the latest checkpoint for trader_id.

WebSocket /ws/trading streams real-time updates; this endpoint provides
a fallback snapshot when the UI first loads or the socket is down.

schema.title: Response Get Positions Api Paper Positions Get

get.description: Return open orders from the latest checkpoint for trader_id.

schema.title: Response Get Orders Api Paper Orders Get

get.description: Return checkpoint history for a trader, newest first.

schema.title: Response Get Checkpoints Api Paper Checkpoints Get
Response Get Session Api Paper Sessions  Trader Id  Get

get.description:
Reconcile a stopped paper session against a validation run.

V1: post-stop only. If the paper session is still running, returns 400.

If `validation_run_id` is omitted, we try to pick the most recent
successful validation run for the same strategy_id as the paper session.
Get run metadata (strategy_id, symbols, timeframe, dates).

schema.title: Response Get Trades Api Results Runs  Run Id  Trades Get
Response Get Sweeps Api Results Runs  Run Id  Sweeps Get
Response Get Equity Curve Api Results Runs  Run Id  Equity Curve Get
Response Get Drawdown Api Results Runs  Run Id  Drawdown Get
Response Get Monthly Returns Api Results Runs  Run Id  Monthly Returns Get
Response List Sizing Configs Api Settings Sizing Get
Response List Risk Configs Api Settings Risk Get
Response List Latency Presets Api Settings Latency Presets Get
Response List Templates Api Strategies Templates Get

post.description:
Engage the system-wide kill switch.

- Persists kill state to the DB so restarts stay halted.
- Sends SIGUSR1 to any active paper-trading PID (best-effort).
- Broadcasts `system_killed` over the trading WebSocket.

display_name.title: Display Name
display_name.description: Human-readable label for the UI (e.g. 'Relative Strength Index')

category.title: Category
category.description: UI category: Trend | Momentum | Volatility | Volume | Custom

popular.title: Popular
popular.description: Highlight in the UI as a commonly-used indicator

chart_placement.title: Chart Placement
chart_placement.description: Rendering hint: 'overlay' (draws on price) or 'oscillator' (own pane)

output_names.title: Output Names
output_names.description: Names of output series (multi-output indicators expose several)

requires_high_low.title: Requires High Low
requires_high_low.description: Indicator needs high/low series (ATR, STOCH, ADX, …)

requires_volume.title: Requires Volume
requires_volume.description: Indicator needs the volume series (MFI, OBV, VWAP, VOLSMA)

IndicatorCatalogEntry.title: IndicatorCatalogEntry
IndicatorCatalogEntry.description:
One indicator row in the catalog response.

Every field maps to an ``IndicatorSpec`` attribute, with ``param_schema``
rendered as ``{name: type_name}`` because types aren't JSON-native.

categories.title: Categories
categories.description: Ordered category list for grouped rendering in the UI

UnlockRequest.title: UnlockRequest
UnlockRequest.description: Request body for POST /api/system/unlock — operator attestation.
